description_long: A group of round, golden-brown donuts is partially visible inside a red, open-top paper carton. The donuts have a smooth, slightly shiny surface, suggesting a plain or lightly glazed finish without any visible toppings. The carton is angular with a wide opening at one end, tapering slightly towards the back, and is made of a single piece of folded red paperboard. The donuts are stacked closely together, filling the carton and peeking out from the open end. The exterior of the carton is unadorned, with no visible branding or markings. The overall presentation is typical of fast-food or street vendor packaging, designed for easy takeaway.
description: A cluster of plain, golden-brown donuts is packed inside a simple red paper carton, with the donuts visible at the open end. The packaging is unbranded and functional, ideal for takeaway.
description_view_0: The open end of the red carton reveals several golden-brown donuts stacked inside, with their smooth surfaces clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side of the red carton is shown, mostly obscuring the donuts except for a small portion peeking out from the left edge.
description_view_2: The closed back of the red carton is visible, with no donuts or interior details exposed.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the carton is shown, with more of the donuts visible at the right edge, partially emerging from the open end.
attribute_packaging_style: open-top red paperboard carton, angular design, unbranded
